positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a vibrant, glowing celestial nebula forming a constellation pattern, interwoven with abstract, geometric line art representing deep space exploration. The central elements should feature stylized silhouettes of flying hot air balloons mixed with interstellar comet trails. Composition must be perfectly circular and highly symmetrical, suitable for a central t-shirt print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of electric teal, neon lavender, deep midnight blue, and accents of pure gold. Style should be vector art mixed with glowing digital paint effects, maintaining clean edges, high detail, and bold shapes. Ideal for apparel printing.
